content.title: Bithumb launches legal action to recover 7 Bitcoin from payout error
content.summary: South Korean crypto exchange Bithumb files for a court-approved asset freeze to reclaim 7 BTC remaining from a February payout error.

content.title: Yuga Labs settles lawsuit against artists accused of copying its NFTs
content.summary: Yuga Labs first filed a lawsuit in June 2022, accusing Ripps and Cahen of copying its Bored Ape Yacht Club cartoon ape images and selling lookalike NFTs.

content.title: Canary Capital submits application for US-based spot PEPE ETF
content.summary: Canary Capital is preparing to launch an ETF tracking Pepe’s price, despite the token trading 85% below its December 2024 all-time high.

content.title: Anthropic loses early appeal over Pentagon ‘supply chain risk’ label
content.summary: “In our view, the equitable balance here cuts in favor of the government,” said a panel of judges from the District of Columbia Court of Appeals.

content.title: 99.99% of Polymarket traders shouldn't quit their day jobs, data suggests
content.summary: While nearly 16% of Polymarket users are in profit, only a tiny fraction have made gains large and consistent enough to entertain walking away from their day job.

content.title: Chainalysis claims stablecoin volumes could reach $1.5 quadrillion by 2035
content.summary: Two macro catalysts — wealth transfer and payment rail disruption — could push stablecoin usage far beyond baseline growth forecasts, analysts say.

content.title: Fed minutes open door to further rate cuts amid Iran war
content.summary: Some officials cautiously eyed a year-end rate cut, but others warned that upward adjustments might be needed if inflation remains above target levels.

content.title: Visa unveils commerce platform enabling autonomous AI shopping
content.summary: Visa is rolling out a platform that helps merchants make their product inventories discoverable and purchasable by AI agents.

content.title: Counterhacker exposes DPRK unit that made $1M a month working IT jobs
content.summary: The North Korean IT workers coordinated crypto payments through a server using a shared, easy-to-guess password “123456.”

content.title: Bitcoin tops $72K as $280M in shorts liquidated: Will ‘fragile truce’ hold?
content.summary: Bitcoin and global markets rallied after the US and Iran announced a ceasefire, but data shows BTC bears have not closed most of their positions yet.
